label: M3_DCM-Harvester
info:
Backend flows for Asset Crawler + Mapper (Harvester).

MongoDB collections:
  hv_runs         – harvest run records (config, status, results, embedded logs + provenance)
  lc_assets       – local catalogue assets (written during harvest, owned by M5_DCM-LocalCatalogue)
  cr_catalogues   – catalogue registry (read-only, shared)

Operations:
  - getHarvestCatalogues (reads from cr_catalogues)
  - startHarvest (creates run, generates assets into lc_assets, stores log + provenance)
  - listHarvestRuns (find all runs)
  - getHarvestRunDetail (find one run)
  - listHarvestLogs (extract logs from runs)
  - listHarvestProvenance (extract provenance from runs)
  - pauseHarvest / resumeHarvest / cancelHarvest (update run status)

SRS Requirements covered:
  FR-ACM-01: Initiating a Harvest
  FR-ACM-02: Harvest Scope
  FR-ACM-03: Lifecycle of Imported Assets
  FR-ACM-04: Linked Assets
  FR-ACM-05: Crawling References

All responses are sent back to the Dashboard via link-out → dashboard-linkin.

name: ══ Asset Crawler + Mapper (Harvester) Backend ══
info:
Handles all Harvest operations per SRS FR-ACM-01 through FR-ACM-05.
Responses go back to Dashboard uibuilder via link-out → dashboard-linkin.

info:
When a catalogue has baseEndpoint but no sourceData,
fetches data via HTTP POST before harvesting.
Supports auth: none, static-token, api-key, token-login.
